item.title: 国际清算银行敦促各国央行不要对能源价格飙升反应过度
item.description: 这个为全球各国央行提供咨询的机构敦促政策制定者不要对伊朗危机引发的全球能源价格飙升反应过度，称这是“忽略”冲击的教科书式案例，尤其是当这种冲击被证明是暂时的时。【原文：The body that advises the world’s central banks has urged policymakers not to overreact to the Iran crisis-driven spike in global energy prices, calling it a textbook case of when to "look through" a shock, ​especially if it proves temporary.】

item.title: 路透社报道称Meta计划裁员20%或更多，其股价应声大涨
item.description: 路透社报道称，这家社交媒体巨头计划裁员20%或更多，以抵消在人工智能方面的巨额支出，并押注该技术带来的生产力提升。受此消息影响，Meta Platforms的股价周一上涨了3%。【原文：Meta Platforms shares rose 3% on Monday following a Reuters report that the ​social media giant plans to lay off 20% or more of its workforce to offset heavy spending ‌on artificial intelligence and bet on productivity gains from the technology.】

item.title: 随着油价上涨，美国邮轮运营成本攀升；嘉年华邮轮或受冲击最大
item.description: 随着油价上涨推高燃油成本，邮轮运营商正面临艰难处境。分析师警告称，嘉年华集团（Carnival Corp）的2026年利润可能遭受最大冲击，因为它是唯一一家未对燃油进行套期保值的美国大型邮轮公司。【原文：Cruise operators face choppy waters as rising oil prices lift fuel costs, with analysts warning Carnival Corp could take the biggest hit to its 2026 profit as it is the only major U.S. cruise line that does not hedge fuel.】

item.title: 加密货币公司Abra将通过与空壳公司合并实现上市
item.description: 加密货币财富管理平台Abra周一表示，鉴于投资者对数字资产公司的兴趣再度升温，该公司计划通过与空壳公司New Providence Acquisition Corp III合并的方式上市。【原文：Crypto wealth management platform Abra plans to go public through a merger with blank-check ​firm New Providence Acquisition Corp III, amid ‌renewed investor interest in digital asset companies, Abra said on Monday.】

item.title: 阿里巴巴CEO执掌新成立的AI业务集团
item.description: 阿里巴巴集团首席执行官吴英权将领导新成立的“阿里巴巴代币中心”业务集团，该集团将专注于为企业构建人工智能工作平台，该公司周一在一份声明中表示。【原文：Alibaba Group ​CEO Eddie Wu will head its newly formed ‌Alibaba Token Hub business group, which will focus on building artificial intelligence work platforms for enterprises, the firm said ​in a statement on Monday.】

item.title: 在时装周的华丽表象背后，阿根廷的纺织业支柱正面临崩溃
item.description: 布宜诺斯艾利斯时装周热闹非凡，模特们纷纷展示着当地设计师的作品，其中既有知名设计师，也有希望在这座拉丁美洲最具影响力的时尚之都之一崭露头角的新锐设计师。【原文：Buenos Aires Fashion Week bustles with models showing off the creations of local designers, some well known and some hoping to break through in one of Latin America's most ​influential fashion capitals.】

item.title: 英伟达首席执行官将在人工智能大型会议GTC上发布新芯片和软件
item.description: 英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋将于周一在加利福尼亚州圣何塞举行的公司年度开发者大会上，向现场众多与会者详细介绍公司的软硬件计划。【原文：Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is set to detail the company's hardware and software ‌plans to a large crowd in San Jose, California, at the company's annual developer conference on Monday.】

item.title: 老年住宅房地产投资信托基金（REIT）Janus Living计划通过在美国首次公开募股（IPO）筹集7.4亿美元
item.description: 这家老年住房房地产投资信托基金周一表示，Janus Living计划通过在美国进行的首次公开募股筹集高达7.4亿美元的资金。【原文：Janus Living is aiming ​to raise as much as $740 ‌million in its initial public offering in the United States, the ​senior housing real estate ​investment trust said on Monday.】

item.title: 随着消费者支出趋紧，Dollar Tree预计全年销售额将保持低迷
item.description: 折扣零售商Dollar Tree与竞争对手Dollar General一样，预测年度销售额将保持低迷，因为面对日益加剧的宏观经济波动，消费者仍在节俭消费。【原文：Discount retailer Dollar Tree joined rival Dollar General in forecasting muted annual sales as ​shoppers stay frugal in the face of mounting macroeconomic volatility.】

item.title: 早盘要闻：央行面临的束缚
item.description: 今日美国及全球市场关注焦点【原文：What matters in U.S. and global markets today】

item.title: 独家：欧洲出版商和科技公司敦促欧盟加快对谷歌搜索业务的罚款
item.description: 欧洲的出版商、科技公司和初创企业已敦促欧盟反垄断监管机构结束针对Alphabet旗下谷歌涉嫌在在线搜索中偏袒自家服务的近两年调查，并对这家科技巨头处以罚款。【原文：European publishers, tech firms and startups have urged EU antitrust regulators to wrap up a near two-year probe into Alphabet unit Google's alleged favouring ​of its own services in online searches and impose a fine on the ‌tech giant.】

item.title: 受科技股走强提振，华尔街期货上涨；中东局势成市场焦点
item.description: 周一，美国股指期货上涨，Meta股价领涨，此前有报道称这家超大市值公司正准备进行大规模与人工智能相关的裁员；与此同时，中东冲突持续升级导致原油价格高企，抑制了市场风险偏好。【原文：U.S. stock index futures rose on Monday with shares of Meta among top gainers after a report said the megacap was ​prepping for sweeping AI-related layoffs, even as elevated crude prices due to the raging Middle East conflict kept risk-taking in check.】

item.title: Nebius与Meta签署人工智能产能协议，金额至少达120亿美元
item.description: 总部位于阿姆斯特丹的Nebius集团周一表示，已与Meta Platforms签署了一份为期五年的新协议，将在2027年前为这家社交媒体巨头提供总计120亿美元的专用AI计算能力，这些资源将分布于多个地点。【原文：Amsterdam-based Nebius ​Group said on Monday it ‌has signed a new five-year deal with Meta Platforms to provide the ​social media giant with $12 ​billion of dedicated AI computing capacity ⁠across multiple locations by ​2027.】

item.title: 美联储将透过战火迷雾，呈现最新经济展望
item.description: 美国联邦储备委员会官员本周将举行会议，商讨伊朗冲突究竟更可能扰乱经济增长、导致通胀持续高企，还是引发经济放缓与物价上涨并存的复杂局面。此前，一场导致全球五分之一石油供应中断的战争，已使他们的政策前景蒙上阴影。【原文：U.S. Federal Reserve officials, their policy outlook roiled by a war that has stranded a fifth of global oil supply, meet this week to debate whether the Iran conflict is more likely to disrupt economic growth, threaten more persistent inflation, or create a confounding mix of economic slowing and rising prices.】

item.title: 据IFX报道，俄罗斯因Telegram应用未删除被禁内容，对其处以432,366美元罚款
item.description: 据俄罗斯国际文传电讯社周一报道，俄罗斯因Telegram即时通讯应用未能删除被禁内容，对其处以3500万卢布（432,366美元）的罚款。【原文：Russia has fined the ​Telegram messaging app 35 ‌million roubles ($432,366) for failing to remove banned ​content, Russia's ​Interfax news agency reported on ⁠Monday.】

item.title: 受沃尔玛支持的PhonePe在地缘政治紧张局势和市场波动之际暂停IPO计划
item.description: 沃尔玛支持的印度金融科技公司PhonePe周一表示，鉴于地缘政治紧张局势以及全球资本市场的波动，该公司已暂时搁置其首次公开募股计划。【原文：Walmart -backed ​Indian ​fintech firm PhonePe ⁠has ​temporarily paused ​its initial public offering ​plans, ​citing geopolitical tensions ‌and ⁠volatility in global capital ​markets, ​the ⁠company said ​on Monday.】

item.title: 裕信银行发起收购德国商业银行股份的要约，旨在重启收购谈判
item.description: 意大利联合信贷银行周一表示，将发起一项非邀约收购，旨在将其在德国商业银行的持股比例提高至30%以上，并迫使这家竞争对手展开合并谈判。【原文：Italy's UniCredit said on Monday it was ​launching an unsolicited offer to increase its stake in ‌Commerzbank to more than 30% and push its rival to engage in merger talks.】

item.title: 英国青少年抵制澳大利亚式的社交媒体禁令
item.description: 英国青少年与国外的同龄人一样，对社交媒体的态度既矛盾又复杂。【原文：British teenagers, like their peers abroad, have a conflicted relationship with social media.】

item.title: 台湾富士康第四季度利润下滑2%，未达预期
item.description: 全球最大的电子代工企业台湾富士康周一公布，其第四季度利润较去年同期下降2.4%，低于市场预期。【原文：Taiwan's Foxconn , the ​world's largest contract ‌electronics maker, reported on Monday a ​2.4% fall ​in fourth-quarter profit versus ⁠the same ​period a year ​earlier, lagging estimates.】

item.title: 日元作为避险货币的光环正在褪色
item.description: 日元是全球首屈一指的避险货币之一——通常在市场动荡时期被预期会走强。那么，面对美国和以色列与伊朗的战争，日元为何表现如此疲软？【原文：The Japanese yen is one of the world's pre-eminent safe haven currencies - typically expected to strengthen in times of market turmoil. So why has it performed so poorly in the face of the U.S. and Israel's war with ​Iran?】

item.title: 随着人工智能热潮导致供应紧张，钌价格创下历史新高
item.description: 分析师和生产商表示，作为铂族金属（PGMs）中的一种次要金属，钌的价格已飙升至历史新高，原因是供应短缺以及与人工智能相关的需求增长导致市场趋紧。【原文：Ruthenium, a minor metal in the platinum-group metals (PGMs), has surged to an all-time ​high as supply constraints and growing demand linked ‌to artificial intelligence tighten the market, analysts and producers said.】

item.title: 中东战事打乱药品空运路线，恐影响抗癌药物供应
item.description: 行业高管表示，中东地区的战事正扰乱了关键药品向海湾地区的供应，危及了抗癌药物及其他需冷藏治疗药物的供应路线，迫使企业改道航班并寻找陆路通道进入该地区。【原文：War in the Middle East is disrupting the flow of critical medicines to the Gulf, imperilling supply routes for cancer drugs and other treatments that require refrigeration and forcing companies to reroute flights ​and find overland access into the region, industry executives said.】

item.title: 晨间竞标：逼近极限总是冒险之举
item.description: 韦恩·科尔为您展望今日欧洲及全球市场走势。【原文：A look at the day ahead in European and global markets from Wayne Cole.】

item.title: 网约车应用inDrive表示2025年营收增长31%，计划拓展配送业务
item.description: 网约车应用 inDrive 的创始人兼首席执行官阿尔森·托姆斯基表示，随着每单收益的提升，该公司去年的净收入增长了近三分之一，此前该公司经历了数年的快速扩张。【原文：Ride-hailing application inDrive saw net revenue grow by nearly a third last year, founder and CEO ​Arsen Tomsky said, as profitability per ride improved ‌following several years of rapid expansion.】

item.title: 华纳兄弟在奥斯卡上的胜利喜忧参半，因派拉蒙收购案迫在眉睫
item.description: 华纳兄弟在周日的奥斯卡颁奖典礼上成为最大赢家，尽管其即将以1100亿美元的价格被派拉蒙-Skydance收购一事，给现场气氛蒙上了一层阴影——这笔交易正在重塑好莱坞的制片厂格局。【原文：Warner Bros emerged as the biggest winner at the Academy Awards on Sunday, ​though the mood was clouded by its pending $110 billion sale to Paramount Skydance , a deal reshaping ‌Hollywood's studio landscape.】

item.title: 独家：随着北京加大自给自足力度，中国第二大芯片制造商正准备投产7纳米芯片
item.description: 据四位知情人士透露，中国华鸿集团已研发出可用于生产人工智能芯片的先进芯片制造技术，这标志着北京在提升科技自主能力方面迈出了重要一步。【原文：China's Hua Hong Group has developed advanced chip manufacturing technologies that can be used to produce artificial intelligence chips, four people familiar with the matter said, a major milestone in Beijing's efforts to boost tech self-sufficiency.】

item.title: 美光计划在新收购的台湾厂址建设第二座芯片工厂
item.description: 美国内存芯片制造商美光科技周一表示，计划在台湾通罗园区建设第二家制造工厂，该园区是该公司近期从力晶科技手中收购的。【原文：U.S. memory chipmaker Micron Technology ​said on Monday it ‌plans to build a second manufacturing facility in ​Taiwan at the Tongluo site ​it recently acquired from Powerchip Semiconductor ⁠Manufacturing Corp .】

item.title: 中美双方正努力在巴黎就贸易管理及农业协议达成共识，为习近平与特朗普的峰会做准备
item.description: 据熟悉谈判情况的消息人士透露，中美两国高级经济官员原定于周一在巴黎结束会谈，双方在农业、关键矿产和贸易管理等领域可能达成共识，这些议题或将在北京由美国总统唐纳德·特朗普和中国国家主席习近平进一步讨论。【原文：Top U.S. and Chinese economic officials were due to ​conclude talks in Paris on Monday, with potential areas of agreement in agriculture, critical minerals and managed trade that could be taken up by U.S. President Donald ‌Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing, sources familiar with the discussions said.】

item.title: 随着战争持续，亚洲股市表现谨慎，油价波动剧烈
item.description: 周一，亚洲市场情绪谨慎，因海湾地区的紧张局势导致油价居高不下，这使得通胀前景更加复杂，预计这将促使大多数央行在本周的政策会议上按兵不动，但可能会有一次加息。【原文：Asian markets were in a wary mood on Monday as hostilities in the Gulf kept oil prices elevated, complicating an inflation outlook that ​should keep most central banks on pause at policy meetings this week, barring one possible hike.】

item.title: 京东在欧洲推出Joybuy，直指亚马逊
item.description: 中国电商巨头京东（JD.com）周一在英国、德国、法国、荷兰、比利时和卢森堡推出了其“Joybuy”在线商城，以此加速拓展海外市场，并瞄准市场领导者亚马逊。【原文：Chinese e‑commerce giant JD.com on Monday launched its ​Joybuy online marketplace in the UK, Germany, France, the Netherlands, Belgium ‌and Luxembourg, stepping up its push beyond its home market and taking aim at market leader Amazon .】
